name: Cinnamon Ribbon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in a small bowl until well blended.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter and 1 cup of the sugar until creamy and light. Beat in eggs, one at a time, and vanilla until well blended.
4. Beat in flour mixture and sour cream, alternately, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
5. In a small bowl, combine remaining 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon.
6. Spoon about one third of the batter into greased and floured 9 x 5-inch loaf pan. Sprinkle with one third of the cinnamon mixture.
7. Repeat with remaining batter and cinnamon mixture until all is used up.
8. Sprinkle the top of the bread with pecans, pressing them in slightly with your fingers.
9. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the middle comes out clean.
10. Cool bread 10 minutes in the pan on a wire rack. Remove from pan and cool completely on rack.
